messages.content: What is the current temperature in London?

result.prompt:
<bos><start_of_turn>user
What is the current temperature in London?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
result.completion:
I do not have access to real-time information, including weather data. To get the current temperature in London, I recommend checking a reliable weather website or app. 

Here are some good options:

* **Google Weather:** Just search "weather London" on Google.
* **AccuWeather:** https://www.accuweather.com/
* **The Met Office:** https://www.metoffice.gov.uk/ 
* **BBC Weather:** https://www.bbc.com/weather 


Let me know if you have other questions! 
<end_of_turn>
